data.title: Peter Thiel's Palantir Bags $30 Million Order From ICE For Immigrant Tracking System
data.description: Peter Thiel's Palantir has signed a $29.8 million contract with ICE to enhance immigration enforcement tools and track visa overstays through a new system.

data.title: Tim Cook's Talks With Commerce Secretary Lutnick Helped Apple Secure Tariff Exemption For iPhones: Report
data.description: In a recent dialogue with U.S. Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick, Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) CEO Tim Cook discussed the potential ramifications of President Trump's tariffs on iPhone prices.

data.title: Elon Musk's Tesla Reportedly Manipulating Odometers To Dodge Warranty Repairs
data.description: Tesla is facing lawsuit over odometer manipulation. Plaintiff claims premature warranty expiration, seeking damages for California Tesla drivers.

data.title: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan Slams 'Suffocating' Bureaucracy — Puts AI Front And Center With Leadership Reshuffle: 'Want To Roll Up My Sleeves…'
data.description: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan has announced a major leadership reshuffle, focusing on artificial intelligence and streamlining operations, as the company works to address past challenges and regain its competitive edge in the AI chip market.

data.title: Trump Admin Exempts US Exporters From China-Built Ship Fees Amid Industry Pushback
data.description: Trump exempts domestic shippers from port fees on China-built vessels, aims to boost US shipbuilding industry and counter Chinese influence.
